content.full_text:
526 "C" Street • P.O. Box 150 • Marysville, CA 95901 • (916) 741-6633

May 27, 1992


Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Division
P.O. Box 807
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Cheryl:

The Board of Zoning Adjustment is responsible for the review
of all Use Permit and Variance applications outside of the
Marysville Redevelopment Area. The Board may make informal
recommendations to the City Council regarding planning matters.
However, the Board does not have any review of zoning or general
plan changes.

I hope this information is helpful. If I can be of further
assistance, please call me.

On behalf of the City of Marysville,

Billie J. Fangman
Deputy City Clerk


526 "C" Street • P.O. Box 150 • Marysville, CA 95901 • (916) 741-6633

April 27, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Division
P.O. Box 807
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Legal Division:

After speaking with Dixie Howard about whether the Board
of Zoning needs to fill out a "721" Form, Dixie informed me that I
should send the Legal Division a description of the Board of
Zoning's duties. I am sending you a copy of Ordinance No. 1112
which repealed Chapter 2.40 of the Marysville Municipal Code to
abolish the Marysville Planning Commission and enacted a new
Chapter 2.40 to establish a Board of Zoning Adjustment. I hope
this Ordinance will give you all the information that you
require.

If I can be of further assistance, please call me.

On behalf of the City of Marysville,

Billie J. Fangman
Deputy City Clerk

[illegible]

[illegible]

[illegible]
